pageContext.name: Jungle Hunter Predator (Battle-Damaged Version)
pageContext.description: There's something out there waiting for us, and it ain't no man. We're all gonna die. – Billy  Prime 1 Studio is excited to present an amazing supplement to a previous fan-favorite statue, and an incredible product on its own: the 1:3 scale PBPR-03: Jungle Hunter Predator Bust, Battle-Damaged Version from Predator (1987)!  Poised to be attractive to ardent Predator fans who did not or were not able to buy the full-sized MMPR-01 Jungle Hunter Predator Statue, the Jungle Hunter Predator Bust is the perfect purchase!  Prime 1 Studio artisans have crafted this bust with the same precision and attention to detail that they devoted to the full statue.  We have outfitted the Jungle Hunter Predator Bust, Battle-Damaged Version with his Bio-Mask with a battle-damaged look. It portrays a Jungle hunter Predator that has met with some kind of considerable resistance in the past! Enough to make a large gash on his Bio-mask! Furthermore, we have equipped this bust with an LED Illuminated Plasma Cannon, so that you can proudly display this beast as it is ready to lay waste to everyone around it.  As a special treat, any collectors who will own or already own the MMPR-01 Jungle Hunter Predator Statue will be able to swap this Battle-Damaged Bio-Mask head onto that statue, further extending the story-telling aspect of that breathtaking piece!  Any discerning connoisseur of the Predator franchise will immediately recognize these busts as an instant legendary classic. So don't wait on getting the Jungle Hunter Predator Bust, Battle-Damaged Version... his self-destruct sequence is counting down! 3...2...1...
